stemHtml: The CG limits of an aircraft are between 4.08 m and 4.32 m aft of the datum. The Take-Off Mass of an aircraft is 3195 kg and the calculated CG is at 4.35 m aft of the datum. If a mass of 84 kg can be moved, what is the distance the mass should be moved in order to get a CG at the aft limit?
